task: sweep dirt to the short dustpan
raw:
SCENE ANALYSIS - A robotic arm is positioned over a scene with a long-handled broom, a short-handled dustpan, and scattered dirt particles on a wooden surface. The broom has a long handle and a wide brush head; the dustpan has a short handle and a shallow pan. The dirt is small, granular, and scattered. STRATEGY - First, grasp the broom to sweep the dirt into a single clump. Then, release the broom and grasp the dustpan to collect the dirt. Failure modes include missing dirt during sweeping or dropping the broom/dustpan. AFFORDANCE REASONING - Step 1: Reach the broom handle for control. Step 2: Grasp the broom handle to lift and sweep. Step 3: Transport the broom to the dirt and sweep. Step 4: Release the broom and grasp the dustpan handle. Step 5: Transport the dustpan to the dirt and place it to collect.
Goal: all_in(dirt, dustpan)
Scene: broom, dustpan, dirt, table
Step 1: reach(broom)
  affordance_region: the long handle of the broom
  contact: gripper_state(open) [progress]
  spatial: distance(gripper, broom, <, 0.03) [completion]
  direction: approach_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: distance(gripper, broom) < 0.03
Step 2: grasp(broom)
  affordance_region: the long handle of the broom
  contact: holding(broom) [completion]
  direction: grasp_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: holding(broom)
Step 3: transport(broom -> dirt)
  affordance_region: the area over the dirt particles
  spatial: above(broom, dirt, 0.05) [completion]
  safety: no_drop(broom)
  done_when: above(broom, dirt, 0.05)
Step 4: sweep(dirt)
  affordance_region: the brush head of the broom
  contact: surface_contact(broom, dirt) [progress]
  direction: sweep_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: dirt is clumped
Step 5: release(broom)
  affordance_region: the long handle of the broom
  contact: released(broom) [completion]
  done_when: released(broom)
Step 6: grasp(dustpan)
  affordance_region: the short handle of the dustpan
  contact: holding(dustpan) [completion]
  direction: grasp_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: holding(dustpan)
Step 7: transport(dustpan -> dirt)
  affordance_region: the area over the clumped dirt
  spatial: above(dustpan, dirt, 0.05) [completion]
  safety: no_drop(dustpan)
  done_when: above(dustpan, dirt, 0.05)
Step 8: place(dustpan -> dirt)
  affordance_region: the shallow pan of the dustpan
  contact: surface_contact(dustpan, dirt) [completion]; released(dustpan) [completion]
  pose: stable(dustpan) [completion]
  done_when: surface_contact(dustpan, dirt) AND released(dustpan)
<END_OF_PLAN>

steps.affordance_region: the long handle of the broom
the long handle of the broom
the area over the dirt particles
the brush head of the broom
the long handle of the broom
the short handle of the dustpan
the area over the clumped dirt
the shallow pan of the dustpan
